name: egg-explorer
description: Browse and install game server templates from the Pterodactyl game-eggs repository directly from the admin panel
author: Karutoil

syncInterval.description: How often to automatically sync with the game-eggs repository

ghToken.description: GitHub Personal Access Token — increases the API rate limit from 60/hr to 5,000/hr for faster full indexing. Create one at https://github.com/settings/personal-access-tokens (no special scopes required).
ghToken.label: GitHub Token
